question: Which of the following is true about the rainfall pattern in City Q during 2023?

options.A: Rainfall was highest in January and lowest in July.
options.B: Rainfall remained constant throughout the year.
options.C: Rainfall steadily declined over the first half of the year.
options.D: Rainfall was highest in July and lowest in January.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
